judges.reasoning: The simulation runs flawlessly and uses a highly effective off-screen metaball rendering technique to create organic, merging, and splitting blobs. The addition of glass reflections, ambient glow, and tiny drifting specks elevates the visual polish significantly.

The frames show a fully working single-file lava lamp with organic metaball wax that deforms, merges, and splits while rising and sinking at a hypnotic pace inside a polished vessel with base, cap, and glow. It meets every requirement and exceeds them with temperature-colored cores, pool dynamics, and glass reflections.

A self-contained metaball-based lava lamp with temperature-driven buoyancy, deformation, merging/splitting, and a nicely rendered glass vessel with cap, base, and heat glow. The physics pacing and visual polish are strong and it should run flawlessly on first open.

Self-contained HTML with a full metaball-based wax simulation including temperature-driven buoyancy, deformation, merging and splitting, plus glass vessel, cap/base, and ambient glow. Code is internally consistent and should run without external assets. Polish is high with reflections, heat shimmer, and color gradient; it clearly exceeds the basic ask with merging/splitting and visual frame.

The single-file code implements a full lava lamp with metaball wax that deforms, merges, and splits naturally, plus liquid specks and glass reflections. It meets every stated requirement and the aesthetic is polished and mesmerizing.
